name: Grant Owner
description: Grants owner auth level to a player.

name: Remove Owner
description: Removes owner auth level from a player.

name: Grant Admin
description: Grants admin auth level to a player.

name: Remove Admin
description: Removes admin auth level from a player.

name: Grant Moderator
description: Grants moderator auth level to a player.

name: Remove Moderator
description: Removes moderator auth level from a player.

name: Grant VIP
description: Grants VIP auth level to a player.

name: Remove VIP
description: Removes VIP auth level from a player.

name: Get Auth Level
description: Displays the auth level of a player.

name: Get All Auth Levels
description: Displays auth levels for all players.

name: Reset Player State
description: Resets the player's state.

name: Create Skull
description: Creates a skull for a player.

name: Toggle Player Sleep
description: Toggles sleep state for a player.

name: Print Position
description: Displays the position of a player.

name: Print Rotation
description: Displays the rotation of a player.

name: Search Chat
description: Searches chat messages for a string.

name: Chat Tail
description: Displays recent chat messages.

name: Find Player Team
description: Displays all members of a player's team.

name: Team Information
description: Displays all members of a specified team.

name: All Team Information
description: Displays all members of all teams.

name: Toggle Team Action Logs
description: Enables or disables team action logs.
